title: [ImportLiberty] Add Liberty file parser for circt-translate
body:
This commit implements a Synopsys Liberty (.lib) file parser for circt-translate. Liberty is a widely-used standard format for describing technology libraries in both open-source (supported by Yosys, ABC, OpenSTA etc) and commercial EDA tools.

The parser supports library, cell, and pin groups with a boolean expression parser for pin functions (AND, OR, XOR, NOT). It generates hw.module operations with comb dialect logic and is registered as --import-liberty. The implementation provides source location tracking for accurate error diagnostics.

Currently, complex attributes and groups are simply converted to dictionary attributes without interpretation. Future work will gradually add support for interesting attributes as first-class MLIR attributes or IR components, though the exact representation is still under consideration. Template resolution for power and delay modeling will also be added in future PRs.

Tests are included for basic functionality and error handling.
